news.t: Harbor Capital and EARNEST Partners Launch ETFs To Pursue Opportunities in Shifting Global Landscape

holdings.infoBox: EPEM is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 13.84%, Samsung Electronics at 9.35%, MediaTek at 4.51%, ASE Technology Holding at 4.37%, and Us Dollar at 4.02%.

overview.description: The Harbor Emerging Markets Equity ETF (EPEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, focusing on emerging markets equities with strong fundamentals and undervalued opportunities. The fund aims for long-term total return. EPEM was launched on Jun 4, 2025 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: Harbor Capital and EARNEST Partners Launch ETFs To Pursue Opportunities in Shifting Global Landscape
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. (“Harbor”) is proud to announce the launch of two additional ETFs, managed by longtime collaborator EARNEST Partners. The two new ETFs are: Harb...
